05What's new — v7

  • 51 games restored: all original games from the transcript history + 12 fully playable demos
  • Category filter in Games tab: All / Memory / Speed / Logic / Attention / Language / Knowledge
  • Competitor-inspired onboarding (4 slides, Elevate/Lumosity pattern): skills → tests → score → anti-repeat
  • Simon Says back: color grid sequence game with procedural generation
  • Card Match back: flip pairs memory game with anti-repeat board layouts
  • Word Scramble back: unscramble letters, bank of 60+ words
  • Color Rush back: tap the correct color name under pressure
  • 10 tests: IQ + Autism + ADHD + Giftedness + MI + Big5 + EQ + Dyslexia + Anxiety + Attachment Style
  • Anti-repeat engine: every session hashed + stored (localStorage, up to 4000 sessions)
  • Game cards fixed: padding-top:56px prevents text overlapping emoji; subtitles max 13px ≤130px wide
  • Screenshots: 10 (Apple max), text amplified 34→62px Outfit 600, status bar clean
FlowIQ · com.rafael.flowiq · preview v7 · 12/jun/2026
